mapper.sql: id, popup_code, popup_name, popup_type, position_type, device_type, width, height, pos_x, pos_y, content, link_url, link_target, is_login_required, is_today_close_enabled, start_at, end_at, sort_order, is_active, is_published, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM site_popup WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM site_popup WHERE popup_code = #{popupCode} AND deleted = 0
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM site_popup WHERE popup_code = #{popupCode} AND deleted = 0 )

SELECT FROM site_popup WHERE deleted = 0 AND is_active = 1 AND is_published = 1 AND (position_type = #{positionType} OR position_type = 'ALL') AND (device_type = #{deviceType} OR device_type = 'ALL') AND (is_login_required = 0 OR (#{isLogin} = 1 AND is_login_required = 1)) AND (start_at IS NULL OR start_at <= NOW()) AND (end_at IS NULL OR end_at >= NOW()) ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_popup ( popup_code, popup_name, popup_type, position_type, device_type, width, height, pos_x, pos_y, content, link_url, link_target, is_login_required, is_today_close_enabled, start_at, end_at, sort_order, is_active, is_published, created_at, created_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{popupCode}, #{popupName}, IFNULL(#{popupType}, 'LAYER'), IFNULL(#{positionType}, 'MAIN'), IFNULL(#{deviceType}, 'ALL'), #{width}, #{height}, IFNULL(#{posX}, 0), IFNULL(#{posY}, 0), #{content}, #{linkUrl}, IFNULL(#{linkTarget}, '_self'), IFNULL(#{isLoginRequired}, 0), IFNULL(#{isTodayCloseEnabled}, 1), #{startAt}, #{endAt}, IFNULL(#{sortOrder}, 0), IFNULL(#{isActive}, 1), IFNULL(#{isPublished}, 1), NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0 )
